meta.title: Hijiri Kogen Ski Area
meta.description: A quiet family snow park away from Hakuba and Shiga crowds.

hero.title:
Hijiri
Kogen
hero.tagline: Skip the mega-resort crowds—affordable, uncrowded skiing for families.

live.subtitle: Lift and snow at a glance

sanctuary.title:
One lift,
easy to watch.
sanctuary.lead: Three fan-shaped courses all return to one base—hard to get separated, with Showa-era local charm. Summit views span the Northern Alps and Myoko.
specs: A advanced 270m · B intermediate 270m · C beginner 260m
sanctuary.noticeBody: No full-time slope restaurant—lunch at Sei Lakeside Hall and nearby spots. Hours vary with snow—confirm before you go.
sanctuary.imgAlt: Compact ski hill with panoramic Alps views

primary.title: Escape the mega-resorts
primary.lead: When Hakuba and Shiga get pricey and packed, weekend adults pay ¥3,000 and parent-child season passes ¥15,000—ski at your family's pace.
primary.imgAlt: Family on an uncrowded groomed run

secondary.title: 360° panorama
secondary.lead: From the summit lookout: Zenkoji Plain, the Northern Alps, Togakushi, Myoko, and Kurohime—big views from a small hill.

freemium.title:
Nagano's
value leader.
freemium.lead: Weekend adults ¥3,000, children ¥2,000. Weekdays cost less—4-hour tickets from ¥2,000. Third Sunday: free lifts for junior high and under.
freemium.imgAlt: Retro ticket counter at a local ski hill

wellness.title:
Lake, food,
and onsen.
wellness.lead: Lunch at Sei Lakeside Hall, Mitaraishi Onsen, farmhouse cafe Seiseido—no slope cafeteria, but a 15-minute drive completes the day.
wellness.leadStation: Use the free rest hut as your hub for nearby food and baths.
wellness.imgAlt: Lake Sei and the Northern Alps after skiing

tour.title:
Half-day
family drive.
tour.lead: Morning runs at Hijiri → lunch at Sei Lakeside → afternoon soak at Mitaraishi—a Nagano day trip without crowds.

am.title: Omachi IC
am.body: ~15 min on the Nagano Expressway · free parking

pm.title: Hijiri Kogen
pm.body: One lift · three courses · sled hill

powderTour.title: Ungroomed days
powderTour.body: Course A after fresh snow and bump lines for advanced skiers—compact hill, real powder days for locals.

snowPlay.title: Free sled hill
snowPlay.body: 50m gentle slope at 3°—free sled area separate from ski runs, perfect for small children.

donation.title: Ski Kids Day
donation.body: Third Sunday Jan–Mar: free lifts for junior high and under. Pairs with the ¥15,000 parent-child season pass.

access.note: ~15 min from Omachi IC · ~15 min by bus/taxi from Hijiri-Kogen Station
access.rentacarLink: Book a rental car at Matsumoto Station
access.rentacarHint: For Omachi IC, Hakuba, and Shiga drives
